query:
-- Get S0883 and S0884 service details
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.serviceTypeDetail,
  s.locationAddress, s.avcId, s.connectionId, s.provider,
  s.monthlyRevenue, s.monthlyCost, s.status, s.billingPlatform,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S0883', 'S0884');

-- Get all DataGate billing items assigned to S0883 and S0884
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.invoiceDate, bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence, bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  sba.serviceExternalId,
  c.name as customerName
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE sba.serviceExternalId IN ('S0883', 'S0884')
ORDER BY sba.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceDate;

-- Get ALL CF Aust DataGate billing items to see the full picture
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence, bi.billingPlatform,
  GROUP_CONCAT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServices
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%CF Aust%' OR c.name LIKE '%CF%Aust%'
GROUP BY bi.externalId
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate, bi.description;

-- Get S0883 and S0884 service details
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.serviceTypeDetail,
  s.locationAddress, s.avcId, s.connectionId, s.provider,
  s.monthlyRevenue, s.monthlyCost, s.status, s.billingPlatform,
  s.customerExternalId,
  c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.externalId IN ('S0883', 'S0884');

-- Get all DataGate billing items assigned to S0883 and S0884
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.invoiceDate, bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence, bi.billingPlatform,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  sba.serviceExternalId,
  c.name as customerName
FROM billing_items bi
JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE sba.serviceExternalId IN ('S0883', 'S0884')
ORDER BY sba.serviceExternalId, bi.invoiceDate;

-- Get ALL CF Aust DataGate billing items to see the full picture
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.invoiceNumber,
  bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence, bi.billingPlatform,
  GROUP_CONCAT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServices
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON bi.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE c.name LIKE '%CF Aust%' OR c.name LIKE '%CF%Aust%'
GROUP BY bi.externalId
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate, bi.description;
